description_long: This is a modern, box-shaped two-story house surrounded by a lush green lawn and a dense hedge of flowering bushes. The house features a flat roof, dark gray exterior cladding, and a minimalist design with large rectangular windows arranged asymmetrically. In the yard, there is a wooden gazebo and a round hot tub, both placed on the grass near the house. The main entrance is a simple black door with a small overhang, and there is a mailbox mounted beside it. The property is enclosed by a thick, well-maintained hedge, providing privacy and a clear boundary.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, dark gray exterior, and large windows, surrounded by a hedge, lawn, gazebo, and hot tub.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, mailbox, gazebo, hot tub, and dense hedge.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back of the house, gazebo, hot tub, and expansive lawn.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the asymmetrical window arrangement and the hedge boundary.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with more windows visible and the hedge enclosing the property.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple black door with a small overhang and adjacent mailbox, no porch or decorative columns
